summary: End-to-end backend (27 pytest cases, 100% pass) + frontend (Playwright) testing for An Deor Quest MVP. All critical flows pass: register/login (JWT + httpOnly cookies), dashboard, tours marketplace, booking, quest completion (XP / cards / badges / regions / rewards), rewards page + redeem, badges/collection, leaderboard (admin excluded), AI Companion 'Ti Dodo' (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations replied in ~8s with Mauritian Creole flavor), chat history persistence, admin panel with award-booking flow, ProtectedRoute redirect, and logout. Admin seeding (admin@andeor.mu) works on startup. No blocking issues found.

minor.issue: Replays full prior history into LlmChat on every request (each previous user msg re-sent). Works but is O(n) latency growth and burns tokens. Consider passing history as context or capping replay window.
Allows self-completion (documented MVP shortcut). Real product needs guide check-in / admin-only.

issues: Mauritius hero image is appropriate; no contrast problems found.

action_items: Optional: optimize /api/chat to avoid re-sending full history each call (currently each previous user message is replayed through LlmChat -> increasing latency and cost).
Optional: tighten /api/bookings/complete to admin-only (current self-complete is documented MVP behavior).
Optional: add data-testid to header avatar/menu trigger (menu-logout is fine; avatar trigger relies on aria-haspopup).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 622 lines - approaching split threshold; consider modularizing (auth, catalog, bookings, rewards, chat, admin) once features grow.
JWT_SECRET is read at import time via os.environ[...] - correct (load_dotenv called first). Good.
Mongo _id correctly excluded via projection {_id:0} everywhere.
bcrypt + httpOnly secure samesite=none cookies match auth playbook.
CORS uses allow_origin_regex='.*' with allow_credentials=True - works in browsers because regex is non-* (acceptable for preview env).
seed_admin is idempotent and updates password hash if .env value changed - good.
No rate-limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook mentions 5-fail lockout). Not blocking for MVP but worth adding.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@andeor.mu / AnDeor2026! (seeded). Test players created dynamically via /api/auth/register with @example.com TLD (note: pydantic EmailStr rejects @*.test and other reserved TLDs).
seed_data_creation: Two TEST players registered via UI (ui_player_*@example.com, ui2_player_*@example.com) plus session-scoped pytest player (test_player_*@example.com). Regions, tours, quests, reward templates auto-seeded by backend startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_andeor_api.py - run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_andeor_api.py -v. Uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env. IMPORTANT: pydantic EmailStr rejects reserved TLDs (.test, .example, .localhost) - use @example.com for test emails. Chat test takes ~5-15s. All admin-complete buttons disappear once status=completed (button is conditional). Frontend Companion uses chat-msg-{i} testid (sequential), not chat-msg-assistant.
rca_of_issues: Initial test failures were in the TEST script itself (using @andeor.test which pydantic EmailStr rejects with 422). Fixed by switching to @example.com. No backend or frontend bugs found.
